Package org.mybatis.generator.runtime

Class AbstractKotlinFunctionGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.mybatis.generator.codegen.AbstractGenerator
org.mybatis.generator.runtime.AbstractKotlinFunctionGenerator
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractKotlinMapperFunctionGenerator
public abstract class AbstractKotlinFunctionGenerator extends AbstractGenerator

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractKotlinFunctionGenerator

      protected AbstractKotlinFunctionGenerator(AbstractGenerator.AbstractGeneratorBuilder<?> builder)

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public boolean execute(KotlinFile kotlinFile, KotlinType kotlinType)
      Executes this generator, calls plugins, and applies the generated function and imports to the Kotlin file. This variant expects the generated function to be a function in a type.
      Parameters:
      kotlinFile - The Kotlin file to which the generated imports will be added.
      kotlinType - The Kotlin type to which the generated function will be added.
      Returns:
      true if the function and imports were successfully generated and added to the Kotlin file, false otherwise.

    • execute

      public boolean execute(KotlinFile kotlinFile)
      Executes this generator, calls plugins, and applies the generated function and imports to the Kotlin file. This variant expects the generated function to be a top-level function.
      Parameters:
      kotlinFile - The Kotlin file to which the generated function and imports will be added.
      Returns:
      true if the function and imports were successfully generated and added to the Kotlin file, false otherwise.

    • generateFunctionAndImports

      public abstract Optional<KotlinFunctionAndImports> generateFunctionAndImports()

    • callPlugins

      public abstract boolean callPlugins(KotlinFunction function, KotlinFile kotlinFile)
